Class EFCoreExtensions

Extension methods on MultitenancyBuilder for configuring EF Core tenant isolation.

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

WithEFCoreIsolation<TContext>(MultitenancyBuilder, Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string>?)

Registers the EF Core isolation services for the specified DbContext. This sets up the TenantDbContextFactory<TContext> and TenantSchemaMigrator<TContext>.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithEFCoreIsolation<TContext>(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string>? configureDb = null) where TContext : DbContext
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder, string> configureDb

A delegate that applies the database provider to the context options. Example: (opts, cs) => opts.UseSqlServer(cs)
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
Type Parameters
Name Description
TContext

Your application DbContext.
